labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541370 ($4,275,045,767) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541370 ($8,875,752,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $161,963 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541370); class <5: 4,125 firms, avg revenue/firm $264,017 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $41,319 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,456 firms, avg revenue/firm $810,381 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $126,825 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 758 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,761,821 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $275,725 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 469 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,603,267 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $876,911 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 76 firms, avg revenue/firm $16,153,224 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,527,980 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 43 firms, avg revenue/firm $32,923,953 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,152,599 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 119
